LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE, IF HE CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, A DISTRICT ADMINISTRATION, EMPLOYEE OR AGENT WHO WAS NEGLIGENT IN THE HIRING, SUPERVISING, AND RETENTION OF MR. CHALA. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO LACK OF SPECIFICITY, AND OVERRULED AS TO NOT BEING WITHIN THE SCOPE OF EMPLOYEE'S JOB OR DUTIES. PARTIES SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE WHICH MAY BE E-MAILED TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2016 Continued To Nov-08-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Conor Granahan, Esq. for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Nov-08-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-09-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Continued To Jun-29-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2016 Continued To May-04-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. CONOR GRANAHAN, ESQ., Tel No. 415-830-3325 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. KEVIN GILBERT, ESQ. of Lozano Smith, Tel No. 925-953-1620 appearing for Defendant San Francisco Unified School District.

Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court vacates its tentative ruling, and orders as follows: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with twenty days leave to amend to allow Plaintiff to allege, if he can do so in good faith, a district administration, employee or agent who was negligent in the hiring, supervising, and retention of Mr. Chala. Defendant's demurrer is overruled as to lack of specificity, and overruled as to not being within the scope of employee's job or duties. Parties shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature which may be e-mailed to contestdept302tr@sftc.org. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Continued To Mar-23-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT is off calendar. Plaintiff filed a First Amended Complaint on December 17, 2015. "The filing of an amended complaint moots a motion directed to a prior complaint." (State Comp. Ins. Fund v. Superior Court (2010) 184 Cal.App.4th 1124, 1131.)

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/EG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2015 Continued To Jan-20-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
